import { ChangelogPage } from '@site/src/components/PageLayouts/wave6';

<ChangelogPage
  repoUrl="https://gitlab.internal.barclays.com/ai-platform/docslide-ai"
  releases={[
    {
      version: "v1.4.0",
      date: "2026-06-01",
      status: "latest",
      summary: "Major upgrade to LangGraph 0.2.x and Anthropic SDK v1 with breaking state API changes.",
      changes: [
        {
          type: "feat",
          description: "Add streaming support to /generate endpoint — server-sent events for real-time progress.",
          pr: "#287",
          author: "varun.pritham"
        },
        {
          type: "feat",
          description: "Add /health endpoint with dependency checks for LLM provider and Slidev port.",
          pr: "#285",
          author: "james.liu"
        },
        {
          type: "fix",
          description: "Fix race condition in _restart_slidev when previous process had not fully exited.",
          pr: "#284",
          author: "priya.shah"
        },
        {
          type: "breaking",
          description: "Upgrade to LangGraph 0.2.x — PipelineState reducers must now be declared explicitly. Update state.py annotations.",
          pr: "#281",
          author: "varun.pritham"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      version: "v1.3.2",
      date: "2026-05-10",
      status: "stable",
      summary: "Stability and performance patch release.",
      changes: [
        {
          type: "fix",
          description: "Fix attachment_resolver crashing on Windows-style backslash paths in source MDX.",
          pr: "#276",
          author: "james.liu"
        },
        {
          type: "fix",
          description: "Fix content_type_classifier fallback not handling empty chunk body gracefully.",
          pr: "#274",
          author: "priya.shah"
        },
        {
          type: "fix",
          description: "Fix validator_agent false-positive JSX detection on angle-bracket generics in TypeScript code blocks.",
          pr: "#271",
          author: "varun.pritham"
        },
        {
          type: "perf",
          description: "Batch Anthropic LLM calls for speaker_notes_writer — reduce p95 latency by ~40% on 20+ chunk documents.",
          pr: "#268",
          author: "james.liu"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      version: "v1.3.0",
      date: "2026-04-15",
      status: "stable",
      summary: "New design agents, Databricks LLM support, and the PacingAgent.",
      changes: [
        {
          type: "feat",
          description: "Add Databricks LLM provider — set LLM_PROVIDER=databricks to use Llama 3.1 70B via Databricks serving.",
          pr: "#261",
          author: "varun.pritham"
        },
        {
          type: "feat",
          description: "Add pacing_agent with over-dense slide detection and total estimated duration in /generate response.",
          pr: "#258",
          author: "priya.shah"
        },
        {
          type: "feat",
          description: "Add section_break_agent — automatically inserts Slidev section separator slides before every H2 heading.",
          pr: "#254",
          author: "james.liu"
        },
        {
          type: "feat",
          description: "Add ENABLE_LANGSMITH env var to trace pipeline runs in LangSmith for debugging.",
          pr: "#250",
          author: "varun.pritham"
        },
        {
          type: "deprecated",
          description: "Deprecate direct use of main.py CLI in production — use the FastAPI server instead. CLI will be removed in v2.0.",
          pr: "#248",
          author: "varun.pritham"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]}
/>
